introSection: Oscar's Wacky Taxi is a wooden roller coaster at Sesame Place Philadelphia in Langhorne, Pennsylvania, USA. It opened in May 26, 2018 and was manufactured by the Gravitykraft Corporation.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The park began teasing a new ride on social media on September 5, 2017, calling it the "biggest, grouchiest" ride yet.

Oscar's Wacky Taxi was announced in September 2017.

The lead car was on display at the 2017 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA. The ride opened on May 26, 2018, with an opening ceremony being held on June 1.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride is a wooden roller coaster from the Gravitykraft Corporation, similar to Roar-O-Saurus at Story Land. It is also the largest investment in Sesame Place's 37-year history.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Two Timberliner trains. The front of the front car of each train looks like a taxi with Oscar the Grouch, who is donning a yellow cap with Slimey on top of it, driving the taxi.

fullText:
Oscar's Wacky Taxi is a wooden roller coaster at Sesame Place Philadelphia in Langhorne, Pennsylvania, USA. It opened in May 26, 2018 and was manufactured by the Gravitykraft Corporation.

The park began teasing a new ride on social media on September 5, 2017, calling it the "biggest, grouchiest" ride yet.

Oscar's Wacky Taxi was announced in September 2017.

The lead car was on display at the 2017 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA. The ride opened on May 26, 2018, with an opening ceremony being held on June 1.

The ride is a wooden roller coaster from the Gravitykraft Corporation, similar to Roar-O-Saurus at Story Land. It is also the largest investment in Sesame Place's 37-year history.

Two Timberliner trains. The front of the front car of each train looks like a taxi with Oscar the Grouch, who is donning a yellow cap with Slimey on top of it, driving the taxi.
